intro: Neginah (singular; plural Neginoth) is a Hebrew musical term appearing in the title of Psalm 61 ("on stringed instruments") and in Lamentations 3:14, where the afflicted speaker becomes "their song" or "their music." The word derives from a root meaning to play a stringed instrument. The related plural Neginoth appears in the titles of Psalms 4, 6, 54, 55, 67, and 76, indicating these psalms were to be performed with string accompaniment.
